title: They Used a Stolen Backhoe to Rob an ATM. It Went Wrong.
script: A stolen backhoe. An ATM! Police in Tobago are looking for robbers who pulled up to a cash machine with a stolen backhoe. They dug out the ATM and dragged it to the sidewalk. Great start. Then the backhoe arm broke. They tried lifting the ATM onto a pickup truck. Failed. Tried again. Still failed. Security cameras recorded the whole thing — more than 10 minutes of footage. One suspect wore a black poncho that kept billowing in the wind like a superhero's cape. He tripped. More than once. By the next morning, Tobago radio was full of jokes. A local newspaper headlined it: 'Batman and robbing.' Police are still looking. The ATM is back where it was. What exactly is the exit strategy when your getaway vehicle is a backhoe?
